---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report a bug or issue with the application
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

**Expected behavior:**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Actual behavior:**
What actually happened instead.

## Screenshots / Error Messages

If applicable, add screenshots or copy-paste error messages to help explain your problem.

## Environment Details

- **OS**: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Browser**: [e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 121, Safari 17]
- **Python version**: [e.g., 3.12.0]
- **Node version**: [if frontend issue, e.g., 18.17.0]
- **Deployment environment**: [local development / staging / production]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here. For example:
- Console logs (browser DevTools)
- Network requests (DevTools Network tab)
- Backend logs (if available)
- Database state (if relevant)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I have included environment details and reproduction steps
- [ ] I have attached relevant logs/screenshots

---

**Note**: For security vulnerabilities, please use the "Security Vulnerability" template instead of this one. Do not disclose potential security issues publicly.
